questionHtml:
The vapour pressure of pure ethanal at 20°C is 101 kPa.

Calculate the vapour pressure of ethanal above the liquid mixture at 20°C.

meta.title: The vapour pressure of pure ethanal at 20°C is 101 kPa. Calculate the vapour pressure of ethanal above the liquid mixture at 20°C.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.5.4—The relationship between the pressure, volume, temperature and amount of an ideal gas is shown in the ideal gas equation PV = nRT and the combined gas law P1V1T1= P2V2T2. Solve problems relating to the ideal gas equation.
